---
title: "Panel Reference"
---

This reference documents **every panel and subpanel** in the SciGraphs sidebar,
organized by tab. Each page describes what a panel does, when it is visible, the
meaning of every control, and the recommended workflow.

For a high-level map of the whole interface, see
**[The sidebar interface](../guide/interface.qmd)**.

## SciGraphs tab

The core combinatorial workflow.

| Panel | What it covers |
| --- | --- |
| [Data](scigraphs/data.qmd) | Importing from files, SQL databases, SuiteSparse, and reproducible pipelines; geospatial and temporal options. |
| [Layout & Positioning](scigraphs/layout.qmd) | Choosing and tuning layout algorithms; interactive layout; Network Splitter 3D. |
| [Graph Algorithms](scigraphs/algorithms.qmd) | Traversal (BFS/DFS), pathfinding, spanning trees, network flow. |
| [Analysis](scigraphs/analysis.qmd) | Centrality, community detection, directed analysis, statistics, topology. |
| [Visualization](scigraphs/visualization.qmd) | Node/edge appearance, scene presets, edge styles, text labels. |
| [Export & Tools](scigraphs/export.qmd) | Export to graph formats, node positions, statistics reports. |
| [Reproducibility](scigraphs/reproducibility.qmd) | Declarative pipeline replay and provenance. |

## OSMnx tab

[Street-network download and analysis](osmnx/index.qmd) from OpenStreetMap.

| Panel | What it covers |
| --- | --- |
| [Download](osmnx/download.qmd) | Import a network by place, point, bbox, polygon, or XML. |
| [Graph Operations](osmnx/graph-operations.qmd) | Projection, conversion, simplification, consolidation, truncation. |
| [Network Attributes](osmnx/attributes.qmd) | Edge lengths, bearings, speeds, and travel times. |
| [Routing & Paths](osmnx/routing.qmd) | Shortest path, K alternatives, and batch routing. |
| [Accessibility](osmnx/accessibility.qmd) | Isochrones, ego subgraphs, network DBSCAN. |
| [Statistics & Centrality](osmnx/statistics.qmd) | Basic stats, circuity, centrality, orientation, node-pair distances. |
| [Features & POIs](osmnx/features.qmd) | OSM feature downloads, POI snapping, geocoding/geometry helpers. |
| [Elevation & Terrain](osmnx/elevation.qmd) | DEM sourcing, 3D positions, grades, terrain mesh, basemaps. |
| [IO / Export](osmnx/io.qmd) | GraphML round-trip, GIS export formats, graph cache. |

## City2Graph tab

[Heterogeneous urban graphs](city2graph/index.qmd) for urban analytics and GeoAI.

| Panel | What it covers |
| --- | --- |
| [Data Import](city2graph/data.qmd) | Overture/OSMnx features, local files, segment processing, and GTFS feeds. |
| [Urban Morphology](city2graph/morphology.qmd) | Segment graphs, tessellations, and morphological building/street graphs. |
| [Transportation](city2graph/transportation.qmd) | Travel-summary and OD graphs from a loaded GTFS feed. |
| [Mobility (OD Matrix)](city2graph/mobility.qmd) | Graphs from an external origin–destination matrix. |
| [Graph Tools](city2graph/graph-tools.qmd) | Largest-component, distance filter, clip, and isochrone utilities. |
| [Proximity Graphs](city2graph/proximity.qmd) | Single-layer, multi-layer, and group-node spatial networks. |
| [Metapath Analysis](city2graph/metapaths.qmd) | Connect amenities through the street network. |
| [GeoAI Export](city2graph/export.qmd) | Export graphs for GNN training and a PyG loader script. |
